channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump calls out Rep Thomas Massie: 'Kentucky, get this LOSER out of politics' Tuesday
item.description: Trump cites Sen. Bill Cassidy's Louisiana defeat as a warning to Rep. Thomas Massie ahead of Kentucky's Tuesday Republican primary.

item.title: 'Get This Loser Out': Trump Now Demanding Massie Primary Defeat
Sen. Graham Urges Trump to Renew US Strikes on Iran
item.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham urged President Trump on Sunday to resume U.S. military strikes on Iran, citing a stalled ceasefire.

item.title: Trump warns Iran's 'clock is ticking': Move 'fast' or 'there won't be anything left'
item.description: President Trump warned Iran on Truth Social that time is running out, as he considers restarting military action.
